name: ANC_ABSENCE_REASONS_VL
query: SELECT AbsenceReasonsDEO.ABSENCE_REASON_ID, AbsenceReasonsDEO.ANC_ABS_REASONS_F_ALTCD, AbsenceReasonsDEO.CREATED_BY, AbsenceReasonsDEO.CREATION_DATE, AbsenceReasonsDEO.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, AbsenceReasonsDEO.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, AbsenceReasonsDEO.ENTERPRISE_ID, AbsenceReasonsDEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, AbsenceReasonsDEO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, AbsenceReasonsDEO.LAST_UPDATED_BY, AbsenceReasonsDEO.LEGISLATION_CODE, AbsenceReasonsDEO.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO.NAME, AbsenceReasonsDEO.STATUS, AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO.DESCRIPTION, AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO.LANGUAGE, AbsenceReasonsDEO.SGUID SGUID, AbsenceReasonsDEO.BASE_NAME FROM ANC_ABSENCE_REASONS_F AbsenceReasonsDEO, ANC_ABSENCE_REASONS_F_TL AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO WHERE AbsenceReasonsDEO.ABSENCE_REASON_ID = AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO.ABSENCE_REASON_ID AND AbsenceReasonsDEO.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND AbsenceReasonsDEO.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND AbsenceReasonsTranslationDEO.LANGUAGE = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'LANG')
